records.title: Effective CPM by channel
records.summary: Track effective cost per mille across display, video, and programmatic channels to measure ad monetization efficiency.
records.metric_definition: Total ad revenue divided by impressions served, multiplied by 1000.
records.methodology_note: Segment by ad format and buyer type (direct vs programmatic).

records.title: Audience reach and frequency
records.summary: Measure deduplicated reach and average frequency across platforms to optimize campaign delivery and reduce waste.
records.metric_definition: Unique users exposed divided by addressable universe; total impressions divided by unique users.

records.title: Privacy-safe audience measurement
records.summary: Adopt privacy-preserving measurement techniques such as clean rooms and differential privacy as third-party identifiers deprecate.

records.title: Content ROI transparency
records.summary: Maintain traceable attribution from content investment to audience engagement and advertising revenue at the title level.

records.title: First-party data monetization
records.summary: Build addressable audience products from first-party identity graphs to recapture ad yield lost to cookie deprecation.

records.title: Content supply chain efficiency
records.summary: Optimize content production, licensing, and distribution costs by connecting audience demand signals to content investment decisions.

records.title: Build use cases on first-party identity data as third-party signals deprecate
records.summary: Prioritize use cases grounded in first-party viewer and subscriber identity graphs rather than third-party cookies or device IDs, as signal deprecation accelerates the value of owned audience understanding.

records.title: Produce privacy-safe audience segments compatible with clean room partnerships
records.summary: Prefer use cases that output audience segments structured for clean room activation and publisher partnerships, enabling cross-platform reach measurement without exposing raw PII.
